steps.title: Identify the general pattern
steps.content: The student wants a generalization about circumnavigations, so the answer should state a broad pattern drawn from the notes. The notes give that pattern directly: most circumnavigations include land stops. They also give two examples, Moreau and Kowalska, showing that some circumnavigations can be nonstop.

steps.title: Reject lists and definitions
steps.content: A lists two sailors and their boats without making a broader claim. B lists two sailors and adds the term circumnavigations. D only defines the term. None of those choices turns the notes into a general pattern with an exception. The answer is C.
